recent_excerpts: A criminal group deployed the self-propagating CanisterWiper malware against Iranian entities, exploiting misconfigured cloud storage to spread and destroy data.
A state-directed internet blackout in Iran has surpassed 1,000 cumulative hours, marking a significant escalation in digital censorship and control tactics.
The FBI disrupted a Russian GRU-backed router hijacking campaign while Iranian threat actors continue exploiting PLCs across US infrastructure.
